# This Is Modest

> Modest things, made with love.

This Is Modest is the products and projects arm of Modest Industries, a boutique digital studio. It is the home for tools, sites, and experiments built by the team.

- Website: https://thisismodest.com
- Shortlink: https://mdst.dev (redirects to thisismodest.com)
- Parent company: Modest Industries (https://modestindustries.co)

## Projects

- [modest-ui](https://modest-ui.com): A minimal, themeable CSS component library. Open source.
- [Dead Wallet](https://deadwallet.com): Stuff you didn't know you wanted, beautifully curated.
- [Browser Snippets](https://browsersnippets.com): Write, share, and execute JavaScript snippets on any site.
- [Plottd](https://plottd.com): Easily add interactive hotspots to your images.

## Relationship to Modest Industries

Modest Industries (https://modestindustries.co) is the parent company — a boutique digital studio specialising in ideas, design, and development. This Is Modest is where its in-house products and projects live. They are separate brands but the same team.
